name: Financial Statements
author: Rudy
description: Complete financial reporting suite with P&L, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow
longDescription: Generates comprehensive financial statements including Chart of Accounts, General Ledger, Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow Statement with monthly trending.
outputs: Guide, Category Mapping, General Ledger, Financial Statements
changelog: 3.0.0: Guide tab, GL-sourced category deduplication, category mapping persistence, batched FS builds, manual override preservation
